caption: The video captures a formal gathering, likely a legislative or parliamentary session, with numerous individuals seated in tiered rows of wooden desks. The attendees, dressed in traditional and formal attire, appear to be engaged in a serious discussion or listening intently to a speaker. Some individuals are holding up their phones, possibly recording the proceedings or taking photos. The atmosphere is orderly, with people maintaining a composed demeanor, suggesting the importance of the event. The setting includes a well-lit room with a structured layout, emphasizing the formality and significance of the occasion.
